2022-23 Portland Pilots Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 14-19 (5-11, 8th in WCC MBB)

Coach: Shantay Legans

PS/G: 77.8 (40th of 363)

PA/G: 78.6 (353rd of 363)

SRS: 1.68 (136th of 363)

SOS: 4.13 (98th of 363)

ORtg: 108.5 (73rd of 363)

DRtg: 109.7 (337th of 363)
